title: SSE live stream loop
required_controls: backpressure; heartbeat; disconnect detection; idle timeout; max session duration
optimization_controls: completion coalescing; cold diagnostics split; zero-copy emit where possible
notes: Long-lived HTTP response that yields events until close/cancel/timeout.

title: SSE heartbeat loop
required_controls: heartbeat interval; missed heartbeat policy; cancellation; backpressure
optimization_controls: coalesce heartbeat with data events when legal
notes: Session liveness loop for SSE.

title: SSE tail producer loop
required_controls: producer cancellation; backpressure; replay window; idle timeout
notes: Backing producer loop, not a protocol loop by itself.

title: WebSocket session message loop
required_controls: fairness; cancellation; bounded buffering; per-session rate budget
optimization_controls: path rematch elision; method rematch minimization; loop body specialization
notes: Primary bidirectional WebSocket loop after connect.

title: WebSocket heartbeat loop
required_controls: interval policy; missed heartbeat policy; cancellation on close
notes: Repeated session-maintenance outputs.

title: WebSocket outbound push loop
required_controls: backpressure; queue policy; cancellation; rate budget
notes: Server-initiated repeated outbound messages.

title: WebSocket inbound consumer loop
required_controls: fairness; cancellation; max frame size; rate budget
optimization_controls: preallocated frame state; method discriminator IDs
notes: Repeated inbound message handling.

title: WebTransport session loop
required_controls: session cancellation; close handling; fairness across substreams
notes: Owns session state and multiplexing for streams/datagrams.

title: WebTransport message loop
required_controls: fairness; cancellation; bounded buffering; rate budget
optimization_controls: method rematch minimization; loop body specialization
notes: Message-family WT frame handling.

title: WebTransport stream loop
required_controls: stream flow control; backpressure; per-stream cancellation; bounded buffering
optimization_controls: fair multiplexing; zero-copy emit; window planning
notes: Long-lived stream chunks in either direction.

title: WebTransport datagram loop
required_controls: rate budget; max datagram size; bounded queue; drop/ack/nack policy
optimization_controls: datagram kind IDs; batch ack/nack; preallocated frame state
notes: Repeated unreliable datagram handling.

title: WebTransport substream fairness loop
required_controls: fair multiplexing; per-substream budgets; cancellation
notes: Prevents a single stream/datagram lane from starving others.

title: HTTP stream response loop
required_controls: backpressure; disconnect detection; producer cancellation; max duration
optimization_controls: zero-copy emit; windowed producer; completion coalescing
notes: Streaming response yields chunks until exhaustion/disconnect/timeout.

title: HTTP stream request loop
required_controls: max bytes; max chunks; timeout; abort cleanup
notes: Inbound request-body streaming.

title: HTTP stream backing producer loop
required_controls: producer cancellation; backpressure; max duration
notes: Backing source loop behind HTTP streaming responses.

title: REST long-poll loop
required_controls: deadline; cancellation; max wait; resource budget
notes: Only viable if long-polling is explicitly in-bound.

title: JSON-RPC subscription loop
required_controls: subscription cancellation; backpressure; heartbeat; rate budget
notes: Only viable if JSON-RPC subscriptions are governed as in-bound.

title: DB tail producer loop
required_controls: producer cancellation; snapshot policy; backpressure; max lag
notes: Not a protocol by itself; feeds SSE/WebSocket/WebTransport/HTTP stream.

title: Pubsub consumer loop
required_controls: consumer cancellation; backpressure; max lag; reconnect policy
notes: Not a protocol by itself; feeds long-lived transports.

title: Plain REST request/response exclusion
required_controls: none beyond normal request limits
notes: Ordinary REST is one-shot, not an unbounded loop.

title: Ordinary JSON-RPC call exclusion
required_controls: none beyond normal request limits
notes: Ordinary JSON-RPC is unary.

title: Lifespan startup/shutdown exclusion
required_controls: lifecycle timeout; error reporting
notes: Lifecycle events are discrete.
